seedanceSegments.title: Sauce roux shimmer
seedanceSegments.description: oil sheen cue roux tightens spice bloom toast...
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault only as global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @SaucepanLarge only as the saucepan silhouette anchor. Use @InductionCloseup only as hob framing guard. Use @Whisk only as whisk prop geometry. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead only as brief overhead viscosity check. Use @GPTStateEnchiladaSauceReduced only as fragile final reduced sauce viscosity target still, not timing driver.

Generate exactly 5 shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds exact, no slow motion, no fades, no extra angles. TikTok vertical 1080:1920 food ASMR, no lettering.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only cookware and liquid ASMR synced to cuts.

Mandatory timing:
0.0-0.9s shimmering hot oil tight macro before flour hits.
0.9-1.8s blond roux paste snapping on whisk wires.
1.8-2.9s dusty brick-red spice matrix toasting visibly.
2.9-4.5s stock jets dissolving lumps into swirling emulsion ribbons.
4.5-6.0s low simmer blister field reading satin meniscus glide.

Hard negatives: no recipe text overlay, no human face, only hands permissible if wrists stay anonymous and fast.

Mandatory audio cues: shimmering heat hiss, matte whisk chatter, bubbling reduction lap.
